mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalGraduates, COUNT(CASE WHEN employment_status != 'UNEMPLOYED' THEN 1 END) as employedCount, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN employment_status != 'UNEMPLOYED' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as employmentRate, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM biz_project WHERE status IN ('1', '3')) as entrepreneurshipCount, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(expected_salary AS INTEGER)) / 1000.0, 1) FROM biz_student_resume r INNER JOIN biz_student s ON r.student_id = s.student_id WHERE s.graduation_year = #{graduationYear} AND r.expected_salary ~ '^[0-9]+$') as avgSalary FROM biz_student WHERE graduation_year = #{graduationYear}

SELECT s.school_id as schoolId, sch.name as schoolName, COUNT(*) as totalStudents, COUNT(CASE WHEN s.employment_status != 'UNEMPLOYED' THEN 1 END) as employedStudents, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN s.employment_status != 'UNEMPLOYED' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as employmentRate FROM biz_student s LEFT JOIN sys_school sch ON s.school_id = sch.id WHERE s.graduation_year = #{graduationYear} GROUP BY s.school_id, sch.name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY employmentRate DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COALESCE(d.dict_label, '未知状态') as statusName, COUNT(*) as count, CONCAT(ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_student WHERE graduation_year = #{graduationYear}), 1), '%') as percentage FROM biz_student s LEFT JOIN sys_dict_data d ON s.employment_status = d.dict_value AND d.dict_type = 'sys_emp_status' WHERE s.graduation_year = #{graduationYear} GROUP BY s.employment_status, d.dict_label ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT salary_range as range, COUNT(*) as count FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(r.expected_salary AS INTEGER) < 3000 THEN '3k以下' WHEN CAST(r.expected_salary AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 3000 AND 4999 THEN '3k-5k' WHEN CAST(r.expected_salary AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 5000 AND 7999 THEN '5k-8k' ELSE '8k以上' END as salary_range FROM biz_student_resume r INNER JOIN biz_student s ON r.student_id = s.student_id WHERE s.graduation_year = #{graduationYear} AND r.expected_salary ~ '^[0-9]+$' ) t GROUP BY salary_range ORDER BY CASE salary_range WHEN '3k以下' THEN 1 WHEN '3k-5k' THEN 2 WHEN '5k-8k' THEN 3 WHEN '8k以上' THEN 4 END

WITH DeliveryData AS ( -- 第一步：获取基础投递数据，并处理空值 -- 如果 company.industry 是 NULL 或空字符串，先将其转换为 '其他' SELECT d.student_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(c.industry, ''), '其他') AS industry_str FROM biz_job_delivery d INNER JOIN biz_job j ON d.job_id = j.job_id INNER JOIN sys_company c ON j.company_id = c.id INNER JOIN biz_student s ON d.student_id = s.student_id WHERE s.graduation_year = #{graduationYear} -- AND d.status IN ('2', '3') ) -- 第二步：将字符串按逗号拆分为多行，并统计去重后的学生数 SELECT single_industry AS industry, COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) AS count FROM DeliveryData CROSS JOIN unnest(string_to_array(industry_str, ',')) AS single_industry GROUP BY single_industry ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalProjects, COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('1', '3') THEN 1 END) as approvedProjects, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 END) as pendingProjects FROM biz_project

WITH ProjectDomains AS ( -- 第一步：过滤出状态符合的项目，并将逗号分隔的 domain 拆分成多行 SELECT unnest(string_to_array(domain, ',')) AS single_domain FROM biz_project WHERE status IN ('1', '3') AND domain IS NOT NULL AND domain != '' ) -- 第二步：用拆分后的单领域值关联字典表，进行分组统计 SELECT COALESCE(d.dict_label, pd.single_domain) AS domain, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ProjectDomains pd LEFT JOIN sys_dict_data d ON pd.single_domain = d.dict_value AND d.dict_type = 'sys_project_domain' GROUP BY pd.single_domain, d.dict_label ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
